# Phase Behavior Experiments

**Summary**: Experimental determination of microemulsion formation and stability across a range of salinities.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023]] performed phase-behavior-experiments to identify the optimal salinity (S*) for surfactant systems.

## Key Results and Findings

- Salinity scans identified an optimum salinity range between 11522 and 17283 ppm for several formulations. ([[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023, p. 76]])
